overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hunter character in a long coat and tricorn hat walking through a foggy, Victorian-era city street at night. The environment features wet cobblestones, gas street lamps, brick buildings, and atmospheric horror aesthetics reminiscent of Bloodborne, with the character exploring the dimly lit urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between brick buildings

agents.ego_description: character in long coat and hat walking steadily forward through the foggy street, holding a weapon in the right hand

entered.detail: tall dark brick building wall running along the left side of the street
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the street lamps
ornate black street lamp with glowing light illuminating the fog
wooden water tower silhouette visible against the foggy sky
dark tree trunk on the right side of the path
black metal trash can on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow, foggy cobblestone street flanked by tall brick buildings. Street lamps cast pools of warm light through the mist, illuminating the wet stones. A tree trunk passes by on the right as the character moves steadily forward through the enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening street approaching stairs and central tree

events.description: building stairs come into view on the left as the street opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward, approaching a more open area with a large tree and building entrance visible ahead

entered.detail: red fire hydrant on the right sidewalk
large decorative planter with white flowers
stone staircase leading up to a building entrance on the left
tall evergreen tree standing in the center of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The street widens slightly as the character passes a fire hydrant and flower planter on the right. A stone staircase appears on the left building, and a large tree becomes visible ahead in the center of the path. The fog persists, maintaining the eerie atmosphere as the character approaches the more open intersection area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy urban corridor that gradually opens into a wider street intersection. It begins with the character walking along a narrow cobblestone path flanked by towering brick buildings, where gas lamps cast warm, isolated pools of light through the dense mist. As the character moves forward, passing a solitary tree trunk on the right, the enclosed feeling of the street begins to shift. The scene then expands as the camera passes a fire hydrant and flower planter, revealing a stone staircase climbing the side of a building to the left. Finally, the path opens further toward a large tree centered in the distance, maintaining an eerie atmosphere as the character approaches the intersection.
